response.justification: Strong 20-year engineering track record with staff-level seniority and recent AI infrastructure work, but lacks the demonstrated AI product expertise, strategic vision, and enterprise advisory experience expected for a director-level AI strategy role. The current engagement with MCP frameworks is technical rather than strategic.
strengths: 20 years of full-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems with multiple staff-level positions
Founder of GISCollective platform showing entrepreneurial initiative and ability to build scalable, production infrastructure
Current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, demonstrating early engagement with modern AI ecosystems
concerns: AI expertise appears recent and infrastructure-focused rather than product-level or strategic—no demonstrated AI-powered products or platforms at scale
No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field (preferred qualification); educational background is general computer science
No evidence of enterprise customer advisory work or external recognition as an AI thought leader—limited public visibility in AI domain
